game.name: stag_hunt
game.description: A cooperative BitWorld hunting game where players surround prey together: rabbits go down alone, but stags, moose, and elephants require coordinated multi-player encirclement.

tokens.description: One connection token per player slot, indexed by slot.

maxTicks.description: Maximum simulation ticks before starting a fresh game, where 0 means no tick limit.

maxGames.description: Maximum fresh games before shutdown, where 0 means no game limit.

names.description: One player name or address per player slot.

scores.description: One hunting score per player slot.

player.name: Coordinator
player.description: Strategic bot that picks high-value prey based on nearby ally count and coordinates encirclement using A* pathfinding.

player.name: Nearest Hunter
player.description: Greedy bot that always chases the closest reachable prey using A* pathfinding.

player.name: Rabbiteer
player.description: Specialist bot that prioritizes rabbits for guaranteed solo kills and consistent energy income.

player.name: Sidekick
player.description: Cooperative bot that follows nearby allies and assists with encirclement of larger prey.

player.name: Stag Hunter
player.description: Mid-tier specialist that targets stags and boars, balancing reward size against required coordination.

variants.name: Smoke
variants.description: Short deterministic Stag Hunt configuration used for manifest checks.
